creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Seems Jarrod got no mail notify for this PR.

Generally I like to have everything SSL enabled, but in this case
I see also a downside.

If SSL is enabled, then the file dh.h will be created during
"make configure" and everyone who use packages use the same dhparam.

If Jarrod (the maintainer) is OK with this I will commit the change,
else I will close the PR in 14 days.

@Jarrod,
Should I update your mail address in this ports?

- net-mgmt/check_snmp_pkgvuln
- net-mgmt/nagios-devel
- net-mgmt/nagios2
- net-mgmt/nrpe2


--
Regards,
olli
